import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[0:70]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"

q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[0:10]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

val_args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[0:10]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[0:50]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[0:50]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"

q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[50:100]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[50:100]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[100:190]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)

q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[100:170]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")

val_args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[100:170]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[170:240]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

val_args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-3295962867968348472']
with open(path) as f: s = json.load(f)
batch = s[170:240]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
with open(path) as f: candidates = json.load(f)
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
# Batch 1
batch = s[0:70]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.
Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares offers investors a unique opportunity to capitalize on the decline of gold mining stocks by providing leveraged inverse exposure to the market.

val_args.code:
import json
path = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
with open(path) as f: candidates = json.load(f)
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
# Batch 1
batch = s[0:70]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.

args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[0:70]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

var_function-call-11574680571502912043.Company Description: ProShares Ultra Bloomberg Natural Gas offers investors leveraged exposure to the natural gas market, aiming to amplify the performance of this vital energy commodity.
ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.
Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares offers investors a unique opportunity to capitalize on the decline of gold mining stocks by providing leveraged inverse exposure to the market.

Direxion Emerging Markets Bear 3X Shares provides investors with a way to profit from declines in emerging market stocks by offering a leveraged inverse exchange-traded fund designed to deliver triple the daily opposite performance of its benchmark index.

val_args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[0:70]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[70:140]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

val_args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[70:140]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.

args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[140:210]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.
Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares offers investors a unique opportunity to capitalize on the decline of gold mining stocks by providing leveraged inverse exposure to the market.

Direxion Emerging Markets Bear 3X Shares provides investors with a way to profit from declines in emerging market stocks by offering a leveraged inverse exchange-traded fund designed to deliver triple the daily opposite performance of its benchmark index.

val_args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[140:210]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[140:175]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.
Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares offers investors a unique opportunity to capitalize on the decline of gold mining stocks by providing leveraged inverse exposure to the market.

Direxion Emerging Markets Bear 3X Shares provides investors with a way to profit from declines in emerging market stocks by offering a leveraged inverse exchange-traded fund designed to deliver triple the daily opposite performance of its benchmark index.

import json

s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[140:175]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"

q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

var_function-call-11574680571502912043.Company Description: ProShares Ultra Bloomberg Natural Gas offers investors leveraged exposure to the natural gas market, aiming to amplify the performance of this vital energy commodity.
ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.
Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares offers investors a unique opportunity to capitalize on the decline of gold mining stocks by providing leveraged inverse exposure to the market.

Direxion Emerging Markets Bear 3X Shares provides investors with a way to profit from declines in emerging market stocks by offering a leveraged inverse exchange-traded fund designed to deliver triple the daily opposite performance of its benchmark index.

args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[175:210]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[175:210]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

args.code:
import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[210:244]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))

var_function-call-11574680571502912043.Company Description: ProShares Ultra Bloomberg Natural Gas offers investors leveraged exposure to the natural gas market, aiming to amplify the performance of this vital energy commodity.
ProShares UltraShort MSCI Brazil Capped offers investors a way to profit from declines in Brazilian equities by providing leveraged exposure to the country's stock market index.

Direxion Auspice Broad Commodity Strategy ETF offers investors a unique opportunity to diversify their portfolios by focusing on a broad range of commodity investments, aiming to capitalize on market trends and provide strategic exposure to various commodities.
Direxion Daily Gold Miners Index Bear 2X Shares offers investors a unique opportunity to capitalize on the decline of gold mining stocks by providing leveraged inverse exposure to the market.

Direxion Emerging Markets Bear 3X Shares provides investors with a way to profit from declines in emerging market stocks by offering a leveraged inverse exchange-traded fund designed to deliver triple the daily opposite performance of its benchmark index.

import json
candidates = locals()['var_function-call-6279816944150415759']
s = [x['Symbol'] for x in candidates]
batch = s[210:244]
dq = chr(34)
sq = chr(39)
template = "SELECT {sq}{{0}}{sq} as Symbol FROM {dq}{{0}}{dq} WHERE {dq}Date{dq} BETWEEN {sq}2015-01-01{sq} AND {sq}2015-12-31{sq} AND {dq}Adj Close{dq} > 200 LIMIT 1"
template = template.format(sq=sq, dq=dq)
q_list = ["(" + template.format(x) + ")" for x in batch]
full = " UNION ALL ".join(q_list)
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(full))
